title: ICICI Pru AMC Q4 results: Profit rises 10% YoY to Rs 763 cr; co declares Rs 12.4 dividend

title: India bonds trim losses as soft CPI spurs value buying
summary: Indian government bonds trimmed ​most of their losses ​on Monday, as softer-than-expected inflation data drew in ​late-session buyers, tempering concerns over price pressures following oil's surge after the collapse of the U.S.-Iran peace talks.
